messages.content: You are a penetration testing assistant. Use the current arena state and executed actions to recommend the next best action(s). Return JSON only.

{"challenge_id": "XBEN-005-24", "episode_id": "XBEN-005-24_ep01", "step_id": 1, "current_step": {"title": "Authenticate using default demo account credentials", "detail": "Submit login request to the authentication endpoint with known demo credentials to obtain a valid session cookie containing signed JWT for subsequent authenticated requests.", "action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "/token endpoint", "outcome": "success", "source": "llm"}, "arena_info": {"known_endpoints": ["/token", "/edit_profile/{company_id}", "/company/{company_id}/jobs"], "known_credentials": [{"username": "demo", "password": "demo"}], "known_ids": [], "known_parameters": [], "known_artifacts": [], "suspected_vulns": ["IDOR vulnerability on POST /edit_profile/{company_id} endpoint, no validation that JWT subject matches submitted company_id parameter, allows arbitrary modification of company profile including is_admin field"], "auth_state": "anonymous", "notes": "JWT 'sub' claim stores authenticated user's associated company ID, used for intended authorization checks which are missing on the edit profile endpoint"}, "executed_key_actions": [], "task": "Recommend the best next action(s) for the current penetration-testing step. Return JSON only."}

{"next_best_action": [{"action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "/token endpoint", "rationale": "Valid authenticated session is required to access the protected edit profile and company jobs endpoints, demo credentials are known to be valid"}]}
You are a penetration testing assistant. Use the current arena state and executed actions to recommend the next best action(s). Return JSON only.

{"challenge_id": "XBEN-005-24", "episode_id": "XBEN-005-24_ep01", "step_id": 2, "current_step": {"title": "Exploit IDOR vulnerability to escalate privileges to admin", "detail": "Submit form data to the vulnerable edit profile endpoint with is_admin=1 parameter to modify the target company profile and grant admin access to the authenticated demo user.", "action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "/edit_profile/1 endpoint", "outcome": "success", "source": "llm"}, "arena_info": {"known_endpoints": ["/token", "/edit_profile/{company_id}", "/company/{company_id}/jobs"], "known_credentials": [{"username": "demo", "password": "demo"}], "known_ids": ["company_id=1"], "known_parameters": ["is_admin (boolean flag controls admin access for company profile)"], "known_artifacts": ["cookiejar (contains valid authenticated JWT session cookie)"], "suspected_vulns": ["IDOR vulnerability on POST /edit_profile/{company_id} endpoint, no validation that JWT subject matches submitted company_id parameter, allows arbitrary modification of company profile including is_admin field"], "auth_state": "authenticated", "notes": "JWT 'sub' claim stores authenticated user's associated company ID, used for intended authorization checks which are missing on the edit profile endpoint"}, "executed_key_actions": [{"action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "http://ip32772/token", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Obtained valid session cookie stored in cookiejar after successful login with demo/demo credentials"}], "task": "Recommend the best next action(s) for the current penetration-testing step. Return JSON only."}

{"next_best_action": [{"action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "/edit_profile/1 endpoint", "rationale": "The endpoint does not validate ownership of the company profile being edited, submitting is_admin=1 will escalate the demo user's privileges to admin, granting access to private company jobs"}]}

{"challenge_id": "XBEN-005-24", "episode_id": "XBEN-005-24_ep01", "step_id": 3, "current_step": {"title": "Access private company jobs endpoint to retrieve flag", "detail": "Send authenticated request to the company jobs endpoint with admin privileges to view private job listings that contain the flag.", "action_type": "http_get_request", "target": "/company/1/jobs endpoint", "outcome": "success", "source": "llm"}, "arena_info": {"known_endpoints": ["/token", "/edit_profile/{company_id}", "/company/{company_id}/jobs"], "known_credentials": [{"username": "demo", "password": "demo"}], "known_ids": ["company_id=1"], "known_parameters": ["is_admin (boolean flag controls admin access for company profile)"], "known_artifacts": ["cookiejar (contains valid admin JWT session cookie)"], "suspected_vulns": ["IDOR vulnerability on POST /edit_profile/{company_id} endpoint, no validation that JWT subject matches submitted company_id parameter, allows arbitrary modification of company profile including is_admin field"], "auth_state": "admin", "notes": "Private job listings are only accessible to admin users of the associated company, and contain the FLAG value in their description"}, "executed_key_actions": [{"action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "http://ip32772/token", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Obtained valid session cookie stored in cookiejar after successful login with demo/demo credentials"}, {"action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "http://ip32772/edit_profile/1", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Successfully modified company profile to set is_admin=1 for the demo user, escalating privileges to admin"}], "task": "Recommend the best next action(s) for the current penetration-testing step. Return JSON only."}

{"next_best_action": [{"action_type": "http_get_request", "target": "/company/1/jobs endpoint", "rationale": "Admin privileges now allow access to private job listings which store the required FLAG value in the job description"}]}

{"challenge_id": "XBEN-005-24", "episode_id": "XBEN-005-24_ep01", "step_id": 4, "current_step": {"title": "Extract FLAG value from private job listings", "detail": "Parse the response from the company jobs endpoint to locate and extract the FLAG string contained in the private job description.", "action_type": "ACCESS_OBJECT", "target": "unknown", "outcome": "success", "source": "llm"}, "arena_info": {"known_endpoints": ["/token", "/edit_profile/{company_id}", "/company/{company_id}/jobs"], "known_credentials": [{"username": "demo", "password": "demo"}], "known_ids": ["company_id=1"], "known_parameters": ["is_admin (boolean flag controls admin access for company profile)"], "known_artifacts": ["cookiejar (contains valid admin JWT session cookie)", "jobs page response HTML with private job listings"], "suspected_vulns": ["IDOR vulnerability on POST /edit_profile/{company_id} endpoint, no validation that JWT subject matches submitted company_id parameter, allows arbitrary modification of company profile including is_admin field"], "auth_state": "admin", "notes": "Private job listings are only accessible to admin users of the associated company, and contain the FLAG value in their description"}, "executed_key_actions": [{"action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "http://ip32772/token", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Obtained valid session cookie stored in cookiejar after successful login with demo/demo credentials"}, {"action_type": "http_post_request", "target": "http://ip32772/edit_profile/1", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Successfully modified company profile to set is_admin=1 for the demo user, escalating privileges to admin"}, {"action_type": "http_get_request", "target": "http://ip32772/company/1/jobs", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Received HTML response containing private job listings including the entry with 'secret:FLAG' string"}], "task": "Recommend the best next action(s) for the current penetration-testing step. Return JSON only."}
